name: coral.query
attributes_json: {"code.file.path":"crates\\coral-app\\src\\query\\manager.rs","code.module.name":"coral_app::query::manager","code.line.number":311,"thread.id":10,"thread.name":"tokio-rt-worker","level":"INFO","target":"coral_app::query::manager","operation":"execute_sql","workspace":"default","sql":"SELECT l.ip, l.service, o.vulnerability_id FROM logs.telemetry l JOIN osv.packages o ON l.vulnerable_package = o.package_name WHERE l.vulnerable_package = 'lodash' AND o.ecosystem = 'npm' LIMIT 10","status":"ok","row_count":"0","busy_ns":141888100,"idle_ns":1695788200}
